chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-3652 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. 16821/2023 2. For hearing of Main Case 21-03-2025 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel a notice has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the notice be determined after providing an opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner and in the meantime no adverse action be taken against the Petitioner. Learned counsel articulates no cavil and states that the petition may be disposed of in above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
